chapter_title.en: Examples of the Qira’a of the Ahl al-Bayt

text: [1571/6] الكافي: علي بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن ابن أبي عمير، عن حماد بن عثمان قال: تلوت عند أبي عبدالله ذَوَا عَدْلٍ مِّنكُمْ فقال: ذُو عَدْلٍ مِّنكُمْ هذا مما أخطأت فيه الكتاب

en.ammaar-muslim: [6/1571] al-Kafi: Ali b. Ibrahim from his father from Ibn Abi Umayr from Hammad b. Uthman who said: I recited in the presence of Abi Abdillah عليه السلام “Dhawa Adlin minkum -> two just men among you” [5:95]. So he said (it should be): “Dhu Adlin Minkum -> a just man among you”. This is among that which the scribes made a mistake in
